summary: A diagramming application where users can drag and drop icons onto a canvas. Features include a white diagram background and image-only icons (no labels) when placed on the diagram.

existing_features.title: Change the attack path diagram canvas background color to white.

Remove text labels from icons after they are dragged and placed onto the attack path diagram canvas. Icons on the canvas must display the icon image only, with no label text rendered beneath or beside them.
